Paragraph

For the last property, suppose \(S\) is a compact set of measure \(0\text{.}\) For \(\epsilon>0\) we can choose a cover of \(S\) by open rectangles \(\{R_{i}\} \) such that \(\sum_{i}\vert R_{i}\vert < \epsilon\text{.}\) Using the compactness of \(S\text{,}\) we can then select a finite sub cover which satisfies the desired property.
in-context
